analytic.title: An empirical study on bugs inside pytorch: A replication study

monogr.title: 2023 IEEE International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution (ICSME)

monogr.title: Toward understanding deep learning framework bugs

biblStruct.note: J. Chen, Y. Liang, Q. Shen, J. Jiang, and S. Li, "Toward understanding deep learning framework bugs," 2023.

analytic.title: An empirical study on performance bugs in deep learning frameworks

analytic.title: The symptoms, causes, and repairs of bugs inside a deep learning library

monogr.title: Journal of Systems and Software
